channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Karan Johar Meets Meryl Streep & Anne Hathaway in Tokyo 2025
item.description: Karan Johar had an exclusive meeting with Meryl Streep and Anne Hathaway in Tokyo that's gone viral on social media. The full conversation will be released soon on platforms like YouTube, Netflix, or Disney+ Hotstar. This rare Bollywood-Hollywood interaction highlights Indian cinema's growing global influence.

item.title: AI Job Displacement: What Indian Tech Pros Need to Know in 2026
item.description: OpenAI's post-AI economy framework signals major disruption for junior-to-mid level engineering roles. Indian tech professionals should pivot toward AI-assisted expertise, specialized domain knowledge, and strategic roles. ChatGPT alternatives and AI tools will eliminate commodity coding work, but create demand for engineers who can architect and direct AI systems.

item.title: Akshay Kumar Real Estate Move 2025: What It Means for Bollywood Stars
item.description: Akshay Kumar leases his premium Mumbai duplex for Rs 1.44 lakh monthly to aircraft commander Anny Divya, showcasing how Bollywood stars diversify wealth through real estate. Meanwhile, new Bollywood movies 2025 continue streaming on Netflix, Disney+ Hotstar, and Prime Video, keeping fans connected to their favorite actors both on and off-screen.

item.title: RR Manager Bhinder Caught With Mobile in IPL 2025 Dugout
item.description: RR manager Bhinder was caught using a mobile phone in the IPL 2025 dugout, violating strict BCCI protocols that ban cell phones during matches to prevent match-fixing and ensure fair play. The BCCI has confirmed the breach, and penalties for the franchise are expected soon.

item.title: Nitish Rana Fined for Obscenity in CSK vs DC IPL 2025 Match
item.description: Nitish Rana faces a fine for audible obscenity during the CSK vs DC match, while captain Ruturaj Gaikwad also got penalized for slow over-rates in IPL 2025. The incident highlights how the league is tightening discipline beyond just cricket performance.

item.title: Pathirana Joins KKR: IPL 2025 Game-Changer for Struggling Team
item.description: KKR's fortunes in IPL 2025 just took a positive turn with Matheesha Pathirana joining after Sri Lanka Cricket granted NOC approval. The young Sri Lankan pacer gives the struggling franchise the fast bowling reinforcement they desperately need after zero wins in four games—a move that could spark their campaign turnaround.

item.title: AI Tools in College 2026: What Indian Tech Pros Need to Know
item.description: San Diego State's survey reveals near-universal AI adoption among college students entering the workforce, combined with concerns about job security and accuracy. For Indian software engineers in the US, this signals an accelerating market demand for AI-fluent technical talent—and a competitive advantage for those who use AI strategically rather than passively. Machine learning salaries and career advancement increasingly favor engineers who master these tools.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Meta's $21B AI Infrastructure Deal: What It Means for Your Machine Learning Salary in 2026
item.description: Meta's $21B CoreWeave investment signals a major shift in AI infrastructure. For Indian engineers in the US: machine learning salaries will stay elevated (especially for infrastructure roles), demand for GPU optimization expertise will spike, and roles building on top of these platforms will expand. If you specialize in compute efficiency, your negotiating power just increased significantly.

item.title: Indian Courts Ban AI in Judging: What It Means for Your Tech Career [2026]
item.description: Indian high courts have banned AI from judicial decision-making but approved it for administrative tasks. This signals institutional clarity on AI boundaries that's reshaping enterprise adoption and creating premium career opportunities for engineers who build compliant, responsible AI systems. Roles emphasizing AI governance are growing 40% faster than generic ML positions, with higher salaries and better long-term stability.

item.title: Ranbir Kapoor's Ramayana 2026: Ravie Dubey Shares Behind-the-Scenes
item.description: Ranbir Kapoor is bringing mythological epic Ramayana to life under director Ravie Dubey, who praises the actor's deep commitment to the role. The film is positioned as a serious, character-driven take on the legendary narrative and will likely hit US theaters followed by streaming on Netflix, Prime Video, or Hotstar. This is one of 2026's most anticipated Bollywood releases.

item.title: Meta's Muse Spark: New AI Tool for Developers in 2026
item.description: Meta's new Muse Spark AI model from Superintelligence Labs is now available, offering Indian developers a new ChatGPT alternative for coding and system design tasks. Early adoption could strengthen your productivity narrative and career positioning in 2026, though the real value lies in mastering tool selection and integration rather than depending on any single AI platform.

item.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Moderate Movement Expected
item.description: EB-2 India is expected to move forward by 12-18 days in May 2026, bringing the Final Action Date to approximately July 28, 2014, continuing the steady monthly progression pattern of the last five months. Retrogression risk remains very low for May, though applicants should monitor July-September carefully as the fiscal year quota becomes constrained.

item.title: IPL 2025: Prabharya vs Travishek Opener Battle in Chandigarh
item.description: IPL 2025 brings an epic showdown between openers Prabharya and Travishek in New Chandigarh. This guide covers the match details, how to watch from the US despite the early morning time slot, and why these two batters are redefining T20 cricket.

item.title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap: Sooryavanshi Takes Lead from Jaiswal
item.description: Sooryavanshi has taken the Orange Cap in IPL 2026 after Match 16, dethroning Jaiswal from the top spot in the tournament's leading run-scorer race. US-based Indian cricket fans can catch all the action through Disney+ Hotstar and YouTube highlights.

item.title: Bangladesh ODI Squad vs New Zealand: 2026 Cricket Updates
item.description: Bangladesh kept their ODI squad unchanged for the New Zealand series opener, though five PSL-contracted players will join later. For Indian diaspora cricket fans in the US tracking India cricket news and IPL updates, this shows how global cricket schedules create complex juggling acts across leagues and international matches. Watch via Willow TV, ESPN+, or YouTube from the US.

item.title: Yash Chopra Foundation Scholarship 2026: Rs. 5 Lakhs for Film Industry Kids
item.description: Yash Raj Films' Yash Chopra Foundation has launched its second YCF Scholarship Program 2026, offering up to Rs. 5 lakhs to children of Hindi film industry workers for higher education. Applications open in 2026 for the 2026–27 academic year; interested families should check YRF's official website and social channels for deadlines and eligibility details.

item.title: Gen Z AI Skepticism Rising: What It Means for Your Tech Career [2026]
item.description: Gen Z uses AI weekly but skepticism is rising—and this shift creates new demand for engineers who can build trustworthy, explainable AI systems. Indian tech professionals who pivot from "using AI faster" to "building AI responsibly" will see salary premiums of 15-25% and stronger visa sponsorship positioning in 2026.

item.title: ICC Expands WTC 2025: One-Test Series Now Allowed
item.description: The ICC is expanding the World Test Championship to include single-Test bilateral series in the next cycle, giving cricket boards (including India) more scheduling flexibility. This means more India cricket matches to follow, more unpredictable WTC standings, and a packed calendar balancing Test cricket with the IPL 2025. For US-based fans, expect more India cricket live score updates and unusual match timings throughout the year.

item.title: India Cricket Tour: Lister Called Up After Clarke Injury
item.description: India's cricket squad faces a reshuffle as fast bowler Lister gets called up to replace injured Clarke for the Bangladesh tour. With Ben Sears unavailable for the ODI leg due to PSL commitments, India tests its bench strength ahead of the ICC Champions Trophy 2025. For US-based Indian cricket fans, watch how Lister performs and catch live scores on Willow TV and streaming platforms.
